text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 08. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
